temoignages.title: Testimonials
temoignages.hint: Click on a testimonial to read it in full

items.name: Aminata & Karim
items.body: The team made our wedding shine. A buffet of rare elegance, impeccable service.

items.name: Sophie M.
items.body: Beautiful cocktail reception, the team was incredibly kind. I highly recommend.

items.name: Latour Office
items.body: Flawless performance. Perfect logistics, creativity in every bite.

items.name: Diallo Family
items.body: Remarkable attention to detail and authentic flavours. Unforgettable.

items.name: Émilie & Thomas
items.body: Everything was perfect, from the canapés to the service. Our guests are still talking about it.

items.name: Restaurant L'Olivier
items.body: Trusting HOB with our event was the best decision. Impeccable service.

items.name: Yasmine B.
items.body: The buffet was a hit. Presentation worthy of a fine restaurant.

items.name: Maison Vermeer
items.body: Elegance, punctuality, creativity. We recommend them without hesitation.

items.name: Mathieu D.
items.body: Attentive team, fresh produce, careful plating. A real experience.

equipe.title: The founders & the team
equipe.historyHeading: A family story, a shared passion
equipe.historyP1: House Of Blessing was born from one woman's passion for gastronomy and the art of hosting, joined by her daughter who shares and carries on the same love for the craft. Together, they design tailor-made events, where every detail matters — from product selection to the presentation of every dish.
equipe.historyP2: Surrounded by a caring and experienced team, they make sure every reception becomes a unique moment, worthy of your guests.
equipe.serviceP: Our team supports every event — wedding, birthday, seminar, private dinner — with the same attention to detail. Refined presentation, elegant plating, and warm hospitality so you can fully enjoy your guests.
equipe.altFondatrices: The founders of House Of Blessing
equipe.altEquipe: House Of Blessing team in service

galerie.title: Gallery
galerie.altBuffet: House Of Blessing buffet and canapés

mentionsLegales.title: Legal Notice
mentionsLegales.placeholderNote: The information below is a template — to be completed with your actual business details.

editor.title: Site publisher
editor.companyValue: House Of Blessing [to complete: SARL / SAS / etc.]

host.title: Host
host.body: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA. Website: vercel.com

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: The entire site (texts, images, videos, logos, graphic identity) is the exclusive property of House Of Blessing. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, total or partial adaptation of these elements is prohibited without prior written authorisation.

data.title: Personal data (GDPR)
data.body1: Data collected via the booking form (name, phone, email, event type, date, number of guests, message) is used solely to process your request and send you a personalised quote.
data.body2: No data is transferred to third parties. Retention: 3 years from the last contact.
data.body3: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act, you have a right of access, rectification, deletion and opposition concerning your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us via WhatsApp or phone.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: This site does not use tracking or advertising cookies. Only strictly necessary technical cookies (language preferences) may be stored on your device.

credits.title: Credits
credits.body: Photography: House Of Blessing and free-licence stock (Pexels, Unsplash). Design and development: [to complete].

section1.body: House Of Blessing was born from one woman's passion for gastronomy, joined by her daughter who shares and carries on the same love for the art of hosting — a family story, passed on with care.

section2.body: Seasonal produce, hand-picked suppliers, fully home-made cooking. Every bite tells of respect for the product and the moment shared.
section2.card1Body: Local producers and seasonal markets. We know where every ingredient comes from.
section2.card2Body: Everything is prepared by our team. No industrial product, no shortcut.
section2.card3Body: Each menu is designed for your event, your guests, your tastes.

section3.body: From plating to welcome, through the rhythm of service — we orchestrate every moment so you only have to think about your guests.
section3.card1Body: First conversation to understand your event, your guests, your venue.
section3.card2Body: Bespoke menu composition and full logistics planning from A to Z.
section3.card3Body: Uniformed team, elegant plating, attentive service to the very last glass.

section4.body: Three simple commitments — kept at every reception, no exception.
section4.card1Body: No industrial preparations. Everything is cooked by our team, to order.
section4.card2Body: No hidden fees. The price you see is the price you pay.
section4.card3Body: Refined presentation and warm welcome — elegance down to the smallest detail.
section4.closing: Our measure of success is your guests' wish to return for your next reception.

section5.body: Weddings, birthdays, christenings, corporate events — trust us with your reception and enjoy your guests fully.
